description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci-push that triggers on push to calamares and 3.2.x-stable branches, on pull request opened, reopened, and synchronize events, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should set up environment variables for building, then run a job on an ubuntu-latest container using the kdeneon/plasma:user image. The job should prepare the source, install dependencies using a bash script, build using a generic build action, and send notifications on success or failure to a Matrix room.
